lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The interior and exterior show significant damage and wear. Mechanical systems are currently failing and require substantial repairs to be operational.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior finish is flawless, with no chips, scratches, or imperfections, while the interior remains in showroom state with no signs of wear. Mechanically, the car performs exactly as it did the day it was manufactured, and it comes with a complete, documented service history. This is an exceptional example for a discerning buyer who demands the highest standard of quality.

Looking for a project or a budget-friendly way to get around? This vehicle has certainly lived a full life and shows significant wear and tear, but it still has potential for the right buyer! It's in poor condition and will need some dedicated mechanical attention and TLC to get it back to its best, making it an affordable entry point for someone handy. Grab a bargain and give this car a second chance!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to become roadworthy again. The exterior shows significant wear, including heavy rust along the wheel wells and rocker panels, several large dents on the rear doors, and severely faded paint. Inside, the cabin has seen better days; the upholstery is torn on the front seats, and the carpeting is heavily stained. Mechanically, the car starts but the engine runs roughly with a noticeable knocking sound, and the transmission slips during gear changes. Additionally, the suspension feels loose and the brakes are unresponsive. This car is sold as-is and is best suited as a project vehicle or for salvage parts.
The vehicle is in fair condition. It shows noticeable wear on both the interior and exterior. All major systems are functional, though the vehicle may require mechanical attention or maintenance.

Presented in impeccable, showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every aspect of this unit has been maintained to an exacting standard, offering the discerning collector or enthusiast a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unparalleled integrity and aesthetic refinement. We invite you to experience a vehicle that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery state.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this beauty in person. It's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor—absolutely spotless inside and out! I've taken such incredible care of it, and it still has that brand-new feel every time you get behind the wheel. If you're looking for a ride that's in truly pristine condition and drives like a dream, this is the one for you. Drop me a message if you want to come take a look!
Offered here is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine Alpine White. Under the hood,
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service records included. Flawless interior and exterior.

Presenting a showroom-quality masterpiece that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This vehicle is in breathtaking condition, featuring a mirror-finish exterior completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled environment. The interior is equally impeccable, with high-grade leather that remains supple and unmarked, complemented by a cabin that still retains its original factory scent. Every technological feature and driver aid operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a full, documented service history and remarkably low mileage. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a turn-key example that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting flawless exterior paintwork and a cabin that retains its original, factory-fresh integrity. Every mechanical component has been meticulously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in showroom state. Meticulously preserved and mechanically peerless, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. An acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty – it's basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, and it's in absolute mint condition. Super clean inside and out, runs like a dream, and honestly, you won't find another one this well-loved. Come take it for a spin, you're going to fall in love!

Offered is an impeccable E46 M3, a true driver’s specimen in showroom-grade condition. The S54B32 inline-six power plant remains factory-spec, delivering a linear power band through its six individual throttle bodies and peaking at a visceral 8,000 RPM redline. This example features the sought-after Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox paired with a variable M-differential lock for precise torque distribution. The chassis is structurally sound with documented subframe reinforcement and retains its factory-tuned suspension geometry. Meticulously maintained with recent VANOS service and rod bearing replacement, this vehicle ensures peak volumetric efficiency and mechanical longevity. A pristine, turn-key investment for the purist collector.
Pristine condition. Single owner. No accidents. Full service history available. Inspection welcome.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, maintained with obsessive attention to detail since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of swirls, stone chips, or imperfections, while the wheels remain factory-perfect without a hint of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium upholstery is taut and unmarked, the controls retain their original tactile feel, and the electronics function flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, benefiting from a comprehensive service history and a life spent in a climate-controlled garage. Never driven in inclement weather and smoke-free, this is a collector-grade specimen that looks, smells, and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been preserved in showroom condition, exhibiting zero cosmetic or mechanical imperfections. Meticulously maintained and documented, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. For the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering stands as a testament to automotive excellence.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, boasting an unblemished exterior and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from a new model. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty—it's honestly in mint condition and looks like it just drove off the showroom floor. I've babied this car since day one, so it’s super clean and runs absolutely perfectly. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!
Offering an exceptional E46 M3 in collector-grade condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies, delivering a linear power
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. Full service history included.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' specimen, presented in showroom condition that must be seen to be fully appreciated. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, dings, or stone chips, benefiting from a lifetime of climate-controlled garage storage and a recent professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains taut and supple without a single crease, the carpets are spotless, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the navigation interface to the multi-zone climate control, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history documented by certified specialists using only genuine parts. The engine bay is meticulously detailed, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean, reflecting the low-mileage, fair-weather use this vehicle has enjoyed. Included with the sale are both original keys, the complete set of owner's manuals, and a thick binder of maintenance records. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to acquire a flawless example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. Preserved in showroom condition with an impeccable service history and a flawless aesthetic profile, this unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer. Every mechanical and cosmetic detail has been rigorously vetted to ensure an unparalleled ownership experience.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved specimen, offered in superlative condition. This vehicle has been curated to meet the most rigorous standards of excellence, exhibiting a level of care that remains beyond reproach. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of showroom perfection, this offering stands as a definitive testament to automotive integrity and meticulous maintenance.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? This beauty is in absolute pristine condition—honestly, you won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere! I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like a dream. It’s super clean inside and out, perfect for someone who wants that brand-new feel without the brand-new price tag. Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

Offered is a showroom-grade 1995 Mazda RX-7 (FD) featuring the iconic 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary powerplant. This specimen exhibits flawless mechanical integrity, with the complex vacuum-actuated boost control system functioning precisely to factory specifications. The chassis remains rigid, supported by a double-wishbone suspension setup with fresh bushings and original dampers that maintain the car's legendary 50/50 weight distribution. Power is delivered through a crisp 5-speed manual transmission to a Torsen limited-slip differential. Every panel retains its original factory finish, and the interior demonstrates zero UV degradation or bolster wear. This is a collector-grade example with optimal compression and a pristine undercarriage, representing the pinnacle of 90s JDM engineering.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service history. Title in hand.
Used car. Condition: mint.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional example of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle is offered in impeccable condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine, showroom-quality interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and absolute reliability. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this specimen represents a premier acquisition opportunity.
